message:
fix: Update ArrayList API for Zig 0.15 in _py_warnings, pprint, and dis

- _py_warnings.zig: Fix ArrayList.init() and method calls
- pprint.zig: Update all ArrayList method calls to pass allocator
- dis/disassembler.zig: Fix ArrayList.init() and method calls

Zig 0.15 changed ArrayList API - allocator no longer stored internally.
